scripts.build-docker-image: export $(cat .env | xargs) && docker buildx build $DOCKER_BUILDX_FLAGS --platform linux/arm64 -t $DOCKER_REGISTRY/aczwink/ame-backend --push .
scripts.dev-server: nodemon --exec "npx acts-util-apilib && tsc; nodemon --exec '(dotenv -e .env -- && cd dist && SCRIPTDIR=../scripts node main.js)' --watch '../../OpenArabicMusicDB/builder/dist/db.json'"
